641747630eb6.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
641747630eb6.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
641747630eb6.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

51ed1c729dcb.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
51ed1c729dcb.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

0f05382bd7a9.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
0f05382bd7a9.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
0f05382bd7a9.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

0bf89ed5b80f.title: Protect the 4.8/5 rating — it took years to build
0bf89ed5b80f.description: With 912 reviews at 4.8/5, your discovery advantage is substantial. Protect it by responding to every review within 48 hours and prompting satisfied tables for feedback.
